builder.cmdDescrp: Configure the interactive onboarding flow for new members.

config.welcomeMessage: Set the welcome message (supports {server} and {user} placeholders).
config.completionRole: Set the role granted when a member completes onboarding.

step.addDescrp: Add a step to the onboarding flow.
step.removeDescrp: Remove a step from the onboarding flow.
step.titleOption: Step title displayed to the user.
step.descriptionOption: Step description displayed to the user.
step.requiredOption: Whether this step must be completed to proceed.

preview.descrp: Preview the onboarding flow by sending it to yourself.

resend.descrp: Resend the onboarding flow to a specific user.
resend.userOption: The user to resend onboarding to.

setup.enabled: Onboarding flow has been **enabled**. New members will receive the onboarding DM.
setup.noSteps: Cannot enable onboarding: no steps have been configured. Add steps first with `/onboarding step add`.
setup.notConfigured: Onboarding is not configured yet. Use `/onboarding step add` to add steps first.

welcomeMessage.label: Welcome Message
welcomeMessage.placeholder: Welcome to {server}! We're glad to have you, {user}.

step.added: Step **{0}** added to the onboarding flow (position #{1}).
step.removed: Step **{0}** removed from the onboarding flow.
step.notFound: Step not found. Use `/onboarding step list` to see all steps.
step.maxReached: Maximum of 10 steps reached. Remove a step before adding a new one.
step.duplicateId: A step with that ID already exists. Choose a different title.

list.title: Onboarding Steps
list.empty: No steps configured. Use `/onboarding step add` to add steps.

stats.title: Onboarding Statistics
stats.description: Completion data for the last {0} days.
stats.noData: No onboarding data found for this period.

preview.sending: Sending onboarding preview to your DMs...
preview.sent: Onboarding preview sent! Check your DMs.
preview.failed: Could not send preview. Make sure your DMs are open.
preview.noSteps: No steps configured. Add steps with `/onboarding step add` first.

resend.failed: Could not send onboarding to {0}. They may have DMs disabled.
resend.noSteps: No steps configured. Add steps with `/onboarding step add` first.

errors.notConfigured: Onboarding is not configured for this server.
errors.general: An error occurred while processing the onboarding command.
errors.dmsClosed: Could not DM the user. They may have DMs disabled for this server.
